summary.original: Design UI surfaces for browser games. Use when the user asks for HUDs, menus, overlays, responsive layouts, or visual direction that must protect the playfield.
summary.zhCN: 为浏览器游戏设计 UI 界面。适用于用户要求设计 HUD、菜单、叠加层、响应式布局，或需要在保护游戏场地的前提下确定视觉方向的场景。

description.original: Design UI surfaces for browser games. Use when the user asks for HUDs, menus, overlays, responsive layouts, or visual direction that must protect the playfield. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 为浏览器游戏设计 UI 界面。适用于用户要求设计 HUD、菜单、叠加层、响应式布局，或需要在保护游戏场地的前提下确定视觉方向的场景。Agent-OPT 将官方技能文档适配为独立的双语 Web 技能工作室，提供章节导航、全文搜索和沙箱化源文件渲染；不会执行任何上游可执行脚本。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA f2681fb955143f96cb04bfa4f1cb09d6839b162a.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier MIT recorded from plugins/game-studio/.codex-plugin/plugin.json. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

name.zhCN: 准备面向具体任务的 Agent 执行手册

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
description.zhCN: 根据有边界的用户目标和上下文，对已固定版本的技能章节进行相关性排序，然后在不执行上游脚本的情况下生成 Agent 提示词、检查清单或参考资料包。

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

description.original: List and safely preview text references, scripts, templates, and licenses captured from the exact upstream commit and recorded in BUNDLE.json.

notes: The in-process adapter reads only the curated original/Chinese bodies and BUNDLE.json-listed supporting files under this skill directory.
Supporting paths must match the fixed hash manifest; traversal, unknown files, symlinks, binary previews, and files above 400KB are rejected.
Upstream scripts and external services are not executed by this Web adaptation.
Selected in the quality-first priority tranche with exact official source and license provenance.
Complete Simplified Chinese body preserves frontmatter, heading hierarchy, code, inline tokens, links, and URLs; validation is automated.
The dedicated profile configures task examples, labels, context, output artifact, bilingual source, and pinned resource workflow for this skill.
Lifecycle is web-ready; verified remains reserved for a passing real Chromium report and any separately executable upstream workflow evidence.
原始 SKILL.md 保持不变；译文已逐节审校，并保留 frontmatter keys、代码块、命令、路径、链接和不可翻译的技术术语。

features: 游戏 UI 任务 with two skill-specific task examples
游戏状态与界面层级 and bounded private context input
游戏 UI 设计包 in agent-prompt, checklist, and reference-pack modes
complete Simplified Chinese and original SKILL.md switch
relevance-ranked official sections with outline, search, and full-text reader
pinned supporting-file browser backed by BUNDLE.json hashes
runtime activity and controlled validation feedback
dedicatedElements: 游戏 UI 任务 input
游戏状态与界面层级 panel
游戏 UI 设计包 result view

tests.evidence: skill-game-ui-frontend: original and complete Chinese bodies opened through skill_open; skill_prepare returned ranked sections, prompt, and checklist; outline/search remained available.
skill-game-ui-frontend: the capability-specific profile objective and context ran in Chinese through skill_prepare and returned a non-empty task artifact.
skill-game-ui-frontend: empty objectives, unknown fields/sections, invalid locale, traversal, and missing supporting assets were rejected with InvocationValidationError.

runner=playwright; browser=chromium; report=var/test-results/playwright.json; testIds=skills.spec.ts › priority Agent Skill browser workflows › @web-e2e [skill-game-ui-frontend] runs bilingual task, source, asset, and failure workflows; route=/plugins/skill-game-ui-frontend; result=passed
skill-game-ui-frontend: source bundle hashes and containment were checked; the adapter only reads curated files and grants no network, commands, secrets, or accounts.

blockers: The shipped bilingual Web adaptation is verified; optional upstream scripts and downstream agent outcomes are outside this adapter and are not claimed as executed.
